title: Greenpill Earth Week
dek: A live Hub coordination thread shows Greenpill chapters using Earth Week to make local regenerative action visible and source-backed.
excerpt: Greenpill Earth Week connected local cleanups, garden work, teach-ins, and Green Goods documentation across the network.
body:
Greenpill Earth Week is a network story first, not a new operational owner model.

The Hub thread starts with a call to coordinate real regenerative action around Earth Day through local cleanups, waste audits, garden or tree-planting workdays, teach-ins, mutual aid, and small public goods experiments that can continue beyond the date.

The replies make the story concrete: Greenpill Kenya discussed plastic collection, tree planting, and Green Goods onboarding; GreenSofa connected the moment to MEGAWEAVING and local resource sharing; Greenpill Cape Town pointed toward support for a Peace Garden project; and Brasil/Fabulosa linked the coordination moment to an upcoming Web3 cafe gathering.

This should stay as one published network story for now. Split it into chapter initiatives only when stewards confirm each local effort's owner, scope, and publication-ready claims.

## Sources

- S048: https://hub.regencoordination.xyz/t/greenpill-earth-week/413
